Tests that freezing `RegExp.prototype.compile` throws a `TypeError`.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that verifies the immutability of the `compile` method on the `RegExp.prototype` object. It attempts to freeze the `compile` method using `Object.freeze` and then calls it, expecting an error to occur. The `try` block contains this operation, and if no error is thrown, the `assert(false)` statement will fail the test. The `catch` block checks that the error thrown is an instance of `TypeError`, confirming that the `compile` method cannot be modified or called after being frozen. This script ensures that the `RegExp.prototype.compile` method behaves as expected when its mutability is restricted.
